latest_changes: Smart Server Selection: Enforced automatic best-server selection based on real-time load metrics.
Enhanced Update UI: New style standalone updater with full Light/Dark theme support.
Improved Connection Stability: Migrated to dynamic Cloudflare server fetching for higher reliability.
Call Session Persistence: Call processing now persists in the background if the window is closed.
Metric Refinement: Optimized pitch inflection analysis.
